header.title: Input
header.subtitle: Single-line text field for forms and search patterns. Supports labels, helper text, error states, and leading/trailing icon slots.

anatomy.title: Anatomy
anatomy.description: An input field is composed of an optional label, an optional leading icon, the text field, an optional trailing icon, and optional helper or error text.

parts.label: Identifies the field. Rendered as a <label> with matching htmlFor. Optional but recommended for accessibility.
parts.leading: Left-side icon slot. Decorative — pointer events are disabled.
parts.field: The native <input> element. Accepts all standard HTML input attributes.
parts.trailing: Right-side icon slot. Interactive — useful for clear buttons or status indicators.
parts.helper: Helper or error message rendered below the field. Error text takes precedence over helper text.

states.title: States
states.description: The input inherits border and shadow from the design token system. Error state overrides the border and focus ring in red.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.description: Three height presets. The default is md. Use sm in dense toolbars and lg for prominent standalone fields.

withIcons.title: With icons
withIcons.description: Attach a leading icon for context or a trailing icon for actions like clearing. Both slots can be active simultaneously.

searchPattern.title: Search pattern
searchPattern.description: Combine leftIcon with a trailing clear button — the most common icon pairing.
searchPattern.note: The clear button in the trailing slot is a plain <button> with pointer-events enabled. The leftIcon slot disables pointer events by default.

props.title: Props
props.description: Extends all native <input> attributes. Component-specific props listed below.

props.label: Label displayed above the field. Generates an id automatically.
props.size: Height preset: sm (32px), md (36px, default), lg (44px).
props.error: Error message shown in red below the field. Also applies error styling to the border.
props.helperText: Hint shown below the field when there is no error.
props.leftIcon: ReactNode displayed in the leading slot. Pointer events disabled.
props.rightIcon: ReactNode displayed in the trailing slot. Interactive.
props.placeholder: Placeholder text shown when the field is empty.
props.extendsNote: Extends all native <input> attributes (type, name, autoComplete, …).
